message:
fix(viewer): handle SPA navigation screencast stall with screenshot fallback

Chrome's PIPE-based screencast stops sending frames after SPA navigation.
This adds immediate screenshot capture on SPA nav to show updated content.

Changes:
- Add needs_screencast_reset flag triggered by Page.navigatedWithinDocument
- Take screenshot immediately after SPA navigation (100ms delay for render)
- Remove white background injection from captureScreenshot (was causing side effects)
- Add session refresh on reset (re-attach to target)
- Send screencast commands through both PIPE and WebSocket as fallback
- Add running check in handleResponse to prevent shutdown race condition
- Add frame pool reset function for screencast restart
